layout.layout/theme.liquid: Root template — loads global assets (constants.js, pubsub.js, global.js), renders header/footer section groups, applies theme font CSS variables

sections.sections/announcement-bar.liquid: Announcement bar section (116 lines) — top-of-page promotional message strip
sections.sections/builder-grid.liquid: 12-column composable page builder (988 lines) — replaces PageFly/Shogun/GemPages; 10 block types: heading, paragraph, image, button, video, spacer, divider, html, liquid, icon_text; flexible column spans (25/33/50/66/75/100%); responsive mobile stacking
sections.sections/container-grid.liquid: Bento layout grid (463 lines) — container query-enabled flexible grid; industrial bento-style card layouts
sections.sections/faq.liquid: Advanced FAQ section (495 lines) — 3 display modes (accordion, sidebar-left, sidebar-right); real-time search filtering; category filtering via data attributes; expandable/collapsible answers
sections.sections/featured-collection.liquid: Featured collection grid (115 lines) — displays products from a selected collection using product-card snippet
sections.sections/footer.liquid: Footer section (239 lines) — newsletter signup, navigation links, social icons, copyright
sections.sections/footer-group.json: Section group for footer — defines footer section slots
sections.sections/header.liquid: Navigation and cart icon (233 lines) — top navigation, search, header-cart web component
sections.sections/header-group.json: Section group for header — defines header section slots
sections.sections/hero.liquid: Hero banner section (208 lines) — full-width hero image with headline and CTA button
sections.sections/main-account.liquid: Account page section (128 lines) — customer login/register
sections.sections/main-cart.liquid: Cart page section (299 lines) — cart line items, quantity inputs, checkout button
sections.sections/main-collection.liquid: Collection listing section (245 lines) — product grid with filtering
sections.sections/main-page.liquid: Generic page template section (80 lines) — renders page.content
sections.sections/main-product.liquid: Product detail page section (344 lines) — gallery, variant-selector, add-to-cart-button, price, description
sections.sections/preset-trust-badges.liquid: Trust badges section (371 lines) — animated icon badges (free shipping, secure checkout, etc.); configurable badge count and icons; inline SVG
sections.sections/shoppable-image-enhanced.liquid: Enhanced shoppable image section (2342 lines) — 5 hotspot marker types: product_hotspot (orange popup card), info_hotspot (hover text circle, green), parts_hotspot (numbered parts diagram, orange), information_pointer (click text box, blue), product_highlights (small product card, teal); per-section CSS variables for all hotspot colors/sizes; card_position setting (auto, top, bottom, left, right)
sections.sections/side-menu.liquid: Documentation sidebar navigation (479 lines) — reading progress indicator; nested menu structure; smooth scroll behavior
sections.sections/smart-grid.liquid: Container query-enabled featured cards (432 lines) — multiple layout options; industrial card blocks with image, tag, heading, body, CTA button; responsive srcset images
sections.sections/social-sharing.liquid: Social share buttons section (430 lines) — share to Twitter/X, Facebook, LinkedIn, Pinterest; copy-link functionality; inline SVG icons

snippets.snippets/meta-tags.liquid: SEO meta tags snippet (51 lines) — og: and twitter: card meta tags
snippets.snippets/product-card.liquid: Product grid card component (98 lines) — grayscale image hover effect, badge support, price display
snippets.snippets/product-card-placeholder.liquid: Placeholder card for empty collections (28 lines)

assets.assets/global.js: All custom element definitions (306 lines) — 7 web components: QuantityInput, AccordionSection, ProductGallery, AddToCartButton, CartDrawer, HeaderCart, VariantSelector
assets.assets/pubsub.js: Simple pub/sub event system (25 lines) — subscribe/publish/unsubscribe helpers
assets.assets/constants.js: Shared constants and event names (10 lines)
assets.assets/base.css: Global styles and CSS custom properties (549 lines) — reset, typography, layout primitives, component utilities, responsive helpers
assets.assets/component-card.css: Product card component styles (178 lines) — card layout, hover states, badge styles

templates.templates/customers/: Customer account templates (login, account, order, addresses, activate, reset)

config.config/settings_schema.json: Theme-wide settings for Shopify admin (currently empty [] — schema not yet built out)

tooling.package.json: Node.js project manifest — pnpm@10.27.0, ESM module type, dev scripts, lint-staged config
tooling.eslint.config.js: ESLint flat config (ESM) — strict rules with JSDoc plugin
tooling..prettierrc: Prettier config — single quotes, semicolons, 100 char width
tooling..github/workflows/ci.yml: CI pipeline — ESLint, Prettier, theme check, JSON validation on push/PR

claude..claude/PROJECT_STARTER.md: Project starter documentation for AI agents
